name: entraiot-connect
description: Entraiot Connect — all 3 stages on one server

scripts.build:stage2: cd stage2 && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:prod: cd stage2 && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf dist-vercel && mkdir -p dist-vercel && cp -r stage1 dist-vercel/portfolio && mv stage2/out dist-vercel/way && cp -r stage3/dist dist-vercel/buildings && echo '<html><head><meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url=/way/"><script>window.location.href="/way/"</script></head><body></body></html>' > dist-vercel/index.html
scripts.dev: concurrently --names SERVER,NEXT,VITE --prefix-colors cyan,green,magenta "node server.js" "cd stage2 && npm run dev -- --port 3001" "cd stage3 && npx vite --port 3002"
